playlist_strategy: High-octane, consistent BPM progression starting at 128 BPM and peaking at 145 BPM to sustain intense cardiovascular workouts, featuring driving basslines, uplifting synth leads, and energetic vocal chops to maximize motivation and endurance.

tracks.title: Heartbeat Horizon
tracks.youtube_title: Unstoppable Cardio Energy 🔥 128 BPM Workout Music
tracks.listening_scenario: Warm-up and initial phase of a focused cardio session.
tracks.target_audience: Runners, cyclists, and fitness enthusiasts starting their workout.
tracks.style_prompt: upbeat progressive house, driving 128 bpm beat, energetic bassline, uplifting melodic synths, fitness motivation music, clean production, gym anthem
tracks.image_prompt: Action shot from a low angle of athletic shoes sprinting on a wet neon-lit street, dynamic motion blur, high contrast orange and blue cinematic lighting, energetic atmosphere, 8k resolution, photorealistic
tracks.youtube_description: Kickstart your cardio session with 'Heartbeat Horizon'! This 128 BPM progressive house track provides the perfect driving energy to get you moving and focused. Save this playlist for your daily run or cycling workout! #CardioMusic #WorkoutMotivation #Energy

tracks.title: Neon Sweat
tracks.youtube_title: Insane Fat Burn Music ⚡ Non-Stop Electronic Energy
tracks.listening_scenario: Hitting the target heart rate zone during steady-state cardio.
tracks.target_audience: Treadmill runners, elliptical users seeking intense motivation.
tracks.style_prompt: intense electro house, pumping 130 bpm, aggressive bassline, energetic drops, high energy fitness music, club banger fit for gym, driving rhythms
tracks.image_prompt: Close up of a glowing fitness smartwatch on a sweaty wrist, bold neon green numbers showing high heart rate, dark background, intense workout lighting, high adrenaline vibe, photorealistic
tracks.youtube_description: Push your limits with 'Neon Sweat'! A high-intensity 130 BPM electro house banger designed to keep you in the fat-burn zone. Hit that subscribe button for more explosive workout music! #FatBurn #ElectroHouse #GymMusic

tracks.title: Velocity Sprint
tracks.youtube_title: Sprint Faster: The Ultimate 135 BPM Running Track 🏃‍♂️💨
tracks.listening_scenario: Increasing pace, transitioning to a faster run or sprint interval.
tracks.target_audience: Runners aiming to increase their pace, high-intensity interval trainers.
tracks.style_prompt: uplifting driving trance, 135 bpm, rolling bassline, hypnotic arpeggios, epic build-ups, energetic running music, euphoric fitness motivation
tracks.image_prompt: Female runner silhouetted against a blazing crimson sunset on a mountain trail, conveying extreme speed and motion, dynamic composition, inspirational fitness aesthetic
tracks.youtube_description: Pick up the pace with 'Velocity Sprint'! This driving 135 BPM trance anthem is built for speed and endurance. Perfect for intervals and breaking personal records. Let us know your PR in the comments! #RunningMusic #Sprint #135BPM

tracks.title: Endorphin Rush
tracks.youtube_title: BOOST Your Energy Naturally | Happy Cardio Vibes 😄🎶
tracks.listening_scenario: Maintaining a joyful, high-energy mood during a dance-cardio or active recovery phase.
tracks.target_audience: Dance fitness enthusiasts, Zumba classes, aerobic workout fans.
tracks.style_prompt: upbeat future house, dance pop feel, 126 bpm, bouncy bass, bright piano chords, happy uplifting vibe, catchy vocal melodies, aerobic workout music
tracks.image_prompt: Abstract burst of vibrant yellow and cyan geometric shapes exploding like fireworks, conveying a sudden rush of joy and energy, modern 3D design, bright lighting
tracks.youtube_description: Get that natural high with 'Endorphin Rush'! A bouncy, uplifting dance-pop track perfect for keeping a smile on your face while you work out. Perfect for dance cardio and aerobics! #HappyWorkout #ZumbaMusic #DanceCardio

tracks.title: Maximum Capacity
tracks.youtube_title: HARDSTYLE CARDIO: Crush Your Limits 💥 150 BPM
tracks.listening_scenario: Peak performance, final sprint, or heaviest physical exertion.
tracks.target_audience: Extreme athletes, heavy lifters doing cardio, intense HIIT practitioners.
tracks.style_prompt: euphoric hardstyle, extreme energy, 150 bpm, distorted punchy kick drum, massive supersaw melodies, epic dramatic build-ups, peak intense workout motivation
tracks.image_prompt: A massively muscular silhouette shattering a glowing concrete wall, sparks flying, deep purple and crimson lighting, extreme power, dynamic action, aggressive fitness art
tracks.youtube_description: Time to give it 100%! 'Maximum Capacity' brings raw hardstyle energy at 150 BPM to push you past the point of exhaustion. Don't quit now! Subscribe for more extreme workout tracks. #Hardstyle #ExtremeWorkout #150BPM

tracks.title: Rhythm Runner

tracks.listening_scenario: Settling into a long-distance run or maintaining a steady, hypnotic rhythm.
tracks.target_audience: Marathon runners, endurance athletes needing a mental zone-out.
tracks.style_prompt: driving slap house, deep house elements, 124 bpm, tight groovy bassline, hypnotic rhythm, focused workout vibe, atmospheric synths, flow state music
tracks.image_prompt: A solitary runner on a misty coastal road at dawn, cool dark blue and aqua tones, peaceful yet driven atmosphere, cinematic wide-angle shot, finding the flow state
tracks.youtube_description: Enter the flow state with 'Rhythm Runner'. This groovy, driving slap house track at 124 BPM is designed to keep you locked into a steady pace for long endurance sessions. Ideal for marathon training! #RunningFlow #DeepHouseWorkout #EnduranceCardio

tracks.title: Adrenaline Circuit
tracks.youtube_title: ADRENALINE OVERLOAD: The Ultimate HIIT Circuit Jam ⚡
tracks.listening_scenario: High-speed circuit training, boxing, or intense rope jumping.
tracks.target_audience: CrossFitters, boxers, interval trainers needing explosive speed.
tracks.style_prompt: aggressive drum and bass, 174 bpm, fast breakbeats, heavy reese bass, frantic energy, extreme workout tempo, intense hiit circuit music, punchy drums
tracks.image_prompt: High-speed motion blur of glowing battle ropes hitting the gym floor, sparks radiating from the impact, warning yellow and black hazardous aesthetic, high adrenaline
tracks.youtube_description: Maximize your intervals with 'Adrenaline Circuit'! Ramping up to a massive 174 BPM, this Drum & Bass track is built for explosive movements and fast-paced circuits. Perfect for jumping rope and boxing! #DrumAndBass #HIIT #BoxingMusic

tracks.title: Cardio Cartel
tracks.youtube_title: Latin Techno Bass - Get You Moving! 💃🕺 Workout Banger
tracks.listening_scenario: Adding a fun, rhythmic twist to a mid-workout routine to revive energy.
tracks.target_audience: Spin class attendees, gym-goers matching repetitive beats.
tracks.style_prompt: lively latin tech house, 127 bpm, punchy tech house drums, spicy brass horn stabs, infectious latin percussion, rolling bassline, energetic spin class music
tracks.image_prompt: Vibrant abstract pattern of soundwaves morphing into energetic dancers, hot pink and mango orange color palette, club lighting style, highly rhythmic visual
tracks.youtube_description: Spice up your routine with 'Cardio Cartel'! This infectious 127 BPM Latin Tech House track will get your heart pumping and shoulders bouncing. A favorite for spin classes everywhere! #LatinTechHouse #SpinClass #CardioGroove

tracks.title: Final Push
tracks.youtube_title: THE FINAL PUSH: Epic Cinematic Workout Motivation 🎬🔥
tracks.hook_type: Huge Brass Hits & Heavy Stomping Beat
tracks.listening_scenario: The grueling final minutes of a workout where pure willpower is needed.
tracks.target_audience: Athletes in the final stages of a punishing workout needing dramatic motivation.
tracks.style_prompt: epic cinematic electronic, heavy midtempo bass, 110 bpm, massive orchestral brass hits, stomping heavy beat, heroic choir, dramatic climax workout motivation, cyberpunk edge
tracks.image_prompt: Low angle heroic view of an athlete reaching the summit of a steep, rugged mountain stair climb, golden hour sunlight breaking through dark storm clouds, triumphant and epic feeling
tracks.youtube_description: Don't stop now, it's 'The Final Push'! When you've got nothing left, let this epic cinematic electronic track fuel your sheer willpower. Finish strong and hit like if you survived! #FinalPush #EpicWorkout #CinematicMotivation

tracks.title: Cool Down Current
tracks.youtube_title: Chill Recovery & Cool Down Music 🌊 Post-Workout Vibes
tracks.listening_scenario: Stretching, heart-rate reduction, and post-workout recovery.
tracks.target_audience: Anyone finishing a workout, focusing on breathing and stretching.
tracks.style_prompt: relaxing chillwave, smooth synthwave, 90 bpm, lush atmospheric analog pads, soft vintage drum machine, gentle chorus guitar, cool down and stretch music, peaceful recovery
tracks.image_prompt: Calm, softly glowing retro sunset reflecting over a perfectly still ocean, soft magenta and purple gradient tones, peaceful synthwave aesthetic, 80s inspired chill vibe
tracks.youtube_description: You did it! Time to stretch and breathe with 'Cool Down Current'. A relaxing 90 BPM chillwave track designed to lower your heart rate safely and reward you for your hard work. See you next workout! #CoolDown #StretchMusic #Recovery
